lines.english: One who tries to speak of these shall regret the attempt.
In the realm of humility, the Word is Beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀਆ ਗਲਾ ਕਥੀਆ ਨਾ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: taa keea galaa katheea naa jaeh |
lines.english: These things cannot be described.
Forms of incomparable beauty are fashioned there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਘੜੀਐ ਸੁਰਾ ਸਿਧਾ ਕੀ ਸੁਧਿ ॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: tithai gharreeai suraa sidhaa kee sudh |36|
lines.english: The consciousness of the spiritual warriors and the Siddhas, the beings of spiritual perfection, are shaped there. ||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਘੜੀਐ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਬੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: tithai gharreeai surat mat man budh |
lines.english: The intuitive consciousness, intellect and understanding of the mind are shaped there.
except the warriors of great power, the spiritual heroes.
No one else dwells there,
They are totally fulfilled, imbued with the Lord's Essence.
In the realm of karma, the Word is Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੇ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਕਥਨੇ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: taa ke roop na kathane jaeh |
lines.english: Their beauty cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai raam vasai man maeh |
lines.english: within whose minds the Lord abides.
Myriads of Sitas are there, cool and calm in their majestic glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਨ ਠਾਗੇ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohi mareh na tthaage jaeh |
lines.english: Neither death nor deception comes to those,
In the realm of Truth, the Formless Lord abides.
They celebrate; their minds are imbued with the True Lord.
The devotees of many worlds dwell there.
Having created the creation, He watches over it. By His Glance of Grace, He bestows happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਥੈ ਤ ਅੰਤ ਨ ਅੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: je ko kathai ta ant na ant |
lines.english: If one speaks of them, there is no limit, no end.
There are worlds upon worlds of His Creation.
There are planets, solar systems and galaxies.
He watches over all, and contemplating the creation, He rejoices.
O Nanak, to describe this is as hard as steel! ||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਵ ਜਿਵ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਤਿਵੈ ਤਿਵ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jiv jiv hukam tivai tiv kaar |
lines.english: As He commands, so they exist.
Let self-control be the furnace, and patience the goldsmith.
With the Fear of God as the bellows, fan the flames of tapa, the body's inner heat.
Let understanding be the anvil, and spiritual wisdom the tools.
In the crucible of love, melt the Nectar of the Name,
and mint the True Coin of the Shabad, the Word of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau nadar karam tin kaar |
lines.english: Such is the karma of those upon whom He has cast His Glance of Grace.
O Nanak, the Merciful Lord, by His Grace, uplifts and exalts them. ||38||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਣੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਿਤਾ ਮਾਤਾ ਧਰਤਿ ਮਹਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: pavan guroo paanee pitaa maataa dharat mehat |
lines.english: Air is the Guru, Water is the Father, and Earth is the Great Mother of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਵਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਦਾਈ ਦਾਇਆ ਖੇਲੈ ਸਗਲ ਜਗਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: divas raat due daaee daaeaa khelai sagal jagat |
lines.english: Day and night are the two nurses, in whose lap all the world is at play.
Good deeds and bad deeds-the record is read out in the Presence of the Lord of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੀ ਆਪੋ ਆਪਣੀ ਕੇ ਨੇੜੈ ਕੇ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karamee aapo aapanee ke nerrai ke door |
lines.english: According to their own actions, some are drawn closer, and some are driven farther away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਕੇਤੀ ਛੁਟੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak te mukh ujale ketee chhuttee naal |1|
lines.english: -O Nanak, their faces are radiant in the Court of the Lord, and many are saved along with them! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗਏ ਮਸਕਤਿ ਘਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam dhiaaeaa ge masakat ghaal |
lines.english: Those who have meditated on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and departed after having worked by the sweat of their brows
So Dar ~ That Door. Raag Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: so dar teraa kehaa so ghar kehaa jit beh sarab samaale |
lines.english: Where is That Door of Yours, and where is That Home, in which You sit and take care of all?
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਦ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਸੰਖਾ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਵਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaaje tere naad anek asankhaa kete tere vaavanahaare |
lines.english: The Sound-current of the Naad vibrates there for You, and countless musicians play all sorts of instruments there for You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਰਾਗ ਪਰੀ ਸਿਉ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਗਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kete tere raag paree siau kaheeeh kete tere gaavanahaare |
lines.english: There are so many Ragas and musical harmonies to You; so many minstrels sing hymns of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਪਵਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਾਜਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano pavan paanee baisantar gaavai raajaa dharam duaare |
lines.english: Wind, water and fire sing of You. The Righteous Judge of Dharma sings at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਈਸਰੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਦੇਵੀ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano eesar brahamaa devee sohan tere sadaa savaare |
lines.english: Shiva, Brahma and the Goddess of Beauty, ever adorned by You, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਚਿਤੁ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano chit gupat likh jaanan likh likh dharam beechaare |
lines.english: Chitr and Gupt, the angels of the conscious and the subconscious who keep the record of actions, and the Righteous Judge of Dharma who reads this record, sing of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਸਣਿ ਬੈਠੇ ਦੇਵਤਿਆ ਦਰਿ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano indr indraasan baitthe devatiaa dar naale |
lines.english: Indra, seated on His Throne, sings of You, with the deities at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਸਾਧ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano sidh samaadhee andar gaavan tudhano saadh beechaare |
lines.english: The Siddhas in Samaadhi sing of You; the Saadhus sing of You in contemplation.
